title: Fix ERD Not Rendering with GoJS Trial Watermark
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the ERD diagram to render correctly without a trial watermark, so that I can view entity relationships for even a single object.
description:
## Bug
When rendering a single object in the ERD, the diagram is empty and the GoJS trial watermark is displayed, indicating a license key issue.

## Fix
The GoJS license key was updated/fixed. After the fix, single-object ERDs render correctly with the licensed version.
acceptance_criteria: ERD renders correctly for a single selected object
GoJS trial watermark is not displayed
License key is valid and properly configured
ux_changes: Fixed empty ERD diagram and removed GoJS trial watermark so diagrams render correctly.
implementation_notes: Recurring GoJS license issue — the key needed to be updated again. Tested with a new Salesforce Trailhead playground account to verify single-object rendering.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the license issue and verified single-object rendering with a new test account.
